arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder makes public plea for coach Thiago to return and declares Manchester City forward Erling Haaland ideal signing - Football España Barcelona meet with agents of 19-year-old playmaker Unai Hernández - will join first-team dynamics after new deal - Football España

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'prepare' bumper deal for Yamal who hopes to 'never leave'
arts.sum: Barcelona are preparing to offer emerging superstar Lamine Yamal a new contract - but they will have to wait until the summer. Barcelona 'prepare' bumper deal for Yamal who hopes to 'never leave'

arts.ttl: Barcelona's gamble on youth is paying off, but will it last?
arts.sum: Despite Barcelona turning to their youngsters in a moment of need, the kids are delivering in brilliant fashion ahead of their first Champions League game.

arts.ttl: How will Barça line up against Monaco?
arts.sum: The wait is over as Barcelona finally make their European debut this season with a trip to France for a rematch of this year’s Joan Gamper Trophy against AS Monaco, as the two teams play their opening match in the new UEFA Champions League’s League Phase on Thursday night. The Blaugrana have made a dream start to the season with five wins out of five to begin the new La Liga campaign, and they now look for a winning start to their European journey and will also try to get some revenge for their loss to Monaco in the Gamper, which is their only bad game under Hansi Flick so far.

arts.ttl: Barcelona hand trial to Gilberto Mora
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this week afforded a trial to one of Mexican football’s next great talents. That’s according to TUDN MEX, who point towards Gilberto Mora as the…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star overtakes Barcelona icon Ronaldinho in UCL record books
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic surrounding the production of a leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has on Tuesday night come to the fore online. The…

arts.ttl: Barcelona still paying manager FOUR YEARS after sacking
arts.sum: Quique Setien has revealed that he is still owed money by Barcelona four years after his sacking. News of Barcelona's troubles continue to abound and one of their former coaches has now revealed that he is still receiving compensation from the club a whole four years after his exit.

arts.ttl: Bayern offer update on Kimmich’s future amid Barca talk
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Max Eberl has offered an update on Joshua Kimmich’s future at the club as he heads towards the end of his current contract. Eberl says he wants Kimmich to stay, and become club captain, but knows that contract talks with be stressful.
